name: Crab Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pastry for 2 crust pie: Roll out dough thinly and cut into 2-inch diameter circles using a cookie cutter.
2. Lightly press dough circles into oiled tart shells. Prick the dough with a fork.
3. Bake at 450 degrees F (232 C) for 5-7 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside.
4. Mix together remaining ingredients: cream cheese, onion, parsley, carrots, crabmeat, nutmeg, white pepper, and salt.
5. Spoon the mixture into tart shells, filling to within 1/2 inch of the top.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 C) for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
